FROM TU OH / CARIS OCEAN CO., LTD

GOOD DAY,

OUR DIRECT/CLOSE TONNAGE OPEN AS FOLLOWS.

AA) MV NEW MOMENTUM (39K/'18) / OPEN MUMBAI, INDIA O/A 15 - 20 MAR 2026
- LAST CGO : STEEL (LAST) – DRYDOCK – GRAIN – STEEL – GRAIN
- EST. BOD VLSFO ABT 400/450MT AND LSMGO ABT 200MT

BB) MV PAN MAJESTY (63K/'16/HANTONG) / OPEN AT PORBANDAR, INDIA O/A 26 - 28TH MAR, 2026
- BOD QTY : ABT 750-850MT HSFO / ABT 50-150MT LSMGO
- LAST CARGOS : COAL (LAST) - POTASH - POTASH - N.ORE – GRAIN

CC) MV PAN NOVA (37K/20’) / OPEN LANSHAN, CHINA 27 – 31 MAR, 2026
- FULLY FITTED LOGGER / AFF 1
- LAST CGOS : LOG (CURRENT) – FERTS – LOG – PETCOKE – LOG
- BOD : ABT 800-900 MT VSLFO / ABT 80-100 MT LSMGO
